Terms & Conditions

DinkSide · Danao, Cebu

1. Booking & Payment
Bookings are only confirmed upon receipt of full payment. Your slot is held for 1 hour after submission. If payment is not received within that time, the slot is released. It is your responsibility to retain your booking reference number.

2. Non-Refundable Policy
All confirmed bookings are final and non-refundable. In cases of rain or weather-related disruptions, bookings may be rescheduled subject to court availability and management approval.

3. Late Arrival
Booking time begins at your reserved start time regardless of arrival. Late arrivals are not entitled to an extension or refund for unused time. Please arrive at least 10 minutes before your slot.

4. Assumption of Risk & Liability Waiver
Pickleball and all physical activities at Orange Pickleball Courts are inherently risky. By booking and entering the facility, you voluntarily accept all risks, known or unknown, including physical injury, falls, and collisions. Orange Pickleball Courts, its owners, staff, and agents shall not be held liable for any injury, illness, loss, or damage arising from your use of the facility, except in cases of gross negligence.

5. House Rules
Please wear proper court attire and rubber shoes (no slippers, please) for your safety and comfort. To help keep the courts clean and in good condition, we kindly ask that food and drinks be enjoyed outside the court premises. Glass containers are prohibited inside the court area. Guests must behave respectfully at all times. Management reserves the right to remove anyone who is disruptive, intoxicated, or poses a safety risk, without refund. Any damage to equipment or property caused by a guest is their financial responsibility.

6. Personal Belongings
Orange Pickleball Courts is not responsible for any personal belongings lost, stolen, or damaged on the premises.

7. Force Majeure
We shall not be liable for cancellations caused by events beyond our control (power outages, natural disasters, government restrictions, etc.). We will make reasonable efforts to reschedule affected bookings.

8. Pets & Court Access
Leashed dogs are welcome! Please keep your dog under control, clean up after them, and be considerate of other guests. Owners are responsible for any injuries, damages, or expenses caused by their dog. For safety, children are not allowed inside the court area.
